productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Adizero Black Sports Shoes
description: Take training to the next level with these Adizero F50 shoes from adidas. The sleek design with the light-weight design and high performance features helps you train better for longer. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.UpperAir mesh uppers with synthetic overlays for excellent ventillationadidas patented 3-Stripe design on the sides for enhanced support and to exude the brand’s belief in performanceLace-ups for snug FitMesh tongue for greater breathabilityCushioned collar for greater comfortBrand name embossed on the tongue and behind the collarMidsoleadiPRENE in the forefoot maintains propulsion and efficiencyMidsole provides lightweight comfortOutsoleadiPRENE under the heel with a scooped out cavity gives superior cushioning at impactFormotion outsole technology in a slightly angular strips on the outsole offers high-wear durabilityPro-moderator medial support device prevents overpronationTORSION system provides adaptive midfoot supportFlex grooves provide greater flexibility to the feetshoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
